title: paraboea glutinosa
intro: Paraboea glutinosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paraboea glutinosa include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
